title: lasthenia californica
intro: Lasthenia californica, also known as California goldfields, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a member of the sunflower family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Lasthenia californica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
